description: An Antiphony actor profile. One record per actor at the well-known `self` rkey, mirroring app.bsky.actor.profile. Port of com.voxpop.actor.profile under the Antiphony namespace.

handle.description: Public handle (e.g. `brad`). Distinct from the AT Protocol handle, which lives on the actor's identity.

rssFeed.description: External podcast feed URL associated with this actor.
